explanation: This command attempts to bypass the Sigma rule by using quotes to separate the '--' flag and the 'collect' argument, and reordering arguments to obscure the intent while still triggering the same behavior.
This command uses a spaceless flag format and escaped quotes to obscure the command line while maintaining the same execution behavior.
This command omits quotes around the final command and uses spacing to separate arguments, which may evade detection while still executing the same process.
